bug.description: incorrect protocol state machine transition that violates 3GPP specification

prompt:
There is a incorrect protocol state machine transition that violates 3GPP specification downstream of function pack_nr_config_request in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/fapi/src/nr_fapi_p5.c:792.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
